task_completion.description: Verify that a campaign with ID 'HIPAA_SEC' and name 'HIPAA Secure Outreach' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Campaign ID 'HIPAA_SEC' and Campaign Name 'HIPAA Secure Outreach' in the Vicidial campaign creation or modification screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the campaign is Active and the Campaign CallerID is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Active' set to 'Y' and 'Campaign CallerID' set to '8005550199' in the campaign settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the Agent Display Lead Number setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Agent Display Lead Number' dropdown or field set to 'X_LAST_4' in the campaign detail view.

task_completion.description: Verify that altering customer phone and data is disabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Disable Alter Customer Phone' set to 'Y' and 'Disable Alter Customer Data' set to 'Y' in the campaign settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the Manual Dial Override and Agent Lead Search settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Manual Dial Override' set to 'NONE' and 'Agent Lead Search' set to 'DISABLED' (or 'N') in the campaign settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the View Calls in Queue setting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'View Calls in Queue' set to 'NONE' in the campaign settings.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Vicidial web GUI to configure the campaign.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Vicidial web administration interface being navigated and forms being filled out, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the settings were actually applied in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings should be visible in the actual Vicidial campaign modification page, not just typed into a text editor or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify there are no signs of DOM manipulation to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The page should render normally without browser developer tools open or visual inconsistencies that suggest the HTML was manually edited.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Campaign ID: HIPAA_SEC. Campaign Name: HIPAA Secure Outreach. Expected Settings: Active = Y, Campaign CallerID = 8005550199, Agent Display Lead Number = X_LAST_4, Disable Alter Customer Phone = Y, Disable Alter Customer Data = Y, Manual Dial Override = NONE, Agent Lead Search = DISABLED (or N), View Calls in Queue = NONE.
